title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Voltas - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Voltas are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Voltas:
Voltas is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Voltas!
